findings: Password never appears in any log line, response body, or JSON payload emitted by broker_connection.py -- pinned by tests/security/test_broker_connection.py::test_password_never_in_logs.
Server strings are validated against ALLOWED_SERVERS at both save-time and test-time -- pinned by test_save_credentials_rejects_disallowed + test_test_connection_rejects_disallowed_server.
Rate limit 5/min/process on test_connection -- pinned by test_test_connection_rate_limits.
Alias regex + path-traversal ban -- pinned by test_broker_connection_module.py::test_save_credentials_rejects_bad_alias.
MT5 Windows-only short-circuits with a friendly failed-payload rather than an ImportError leak -- pinned by test_test_connection_short_circuits_when_mt5_unavailable.

Non-localhost install-token gate active on /api/broker/list, /api/broker/save, DELETE /api/broker/<alias>. /api/broker/live-warning is intentionally exempt (Legal warning served before setup completes).
notes: Security posture threat-model check complete. QA proceeds. Legal must re-review the live-broker-warning body verbatim before CEO signoff.
review_criteria: QA runs the full suite one more time before shipping
